return(function(Q,F,N,o,w,q,a,t,k,v,P,e,U,h,I,Z,l,V,f,A,O,g,H,S,p)A,t,l,I,h,f,O,k,P,e,U,S,Z,g,p,H,v,V={},function(Q,n)local F=g(n)local N=function(N,o,w,q)return e(Q,{N;o;w;q},n,F)end return N e(Q,{N;o,w,q,a,Z;A;P,V;g,I},n,F)end return N end,function(Q,n)local F=g(n)local N=function(N,o,w,q,a,Z)return e(Q,{N,o,w;q;a;Z},n,F)end return N end,function()V=V+(-328111+328112)A[V]=96724-96723 end,{},function(Q)for n=457763+-457762,#Q,-955574-(-955575)do A[Q[n]]=(-152719-(-152720))+A[Q[n]]end if N then local e=N(true)local F=w(e)F[n(410187-442186)],F[n(365931+-397606)],F[n(-234283+202277)]=Q,I,function()return-652078+3172493 end return e else return o({},{[n(-641592+609917)]=I;[n(986633+-1018632)]=Q;[n(81140-113146)]=function()return-335802+2856217 end})end end,function(Q,n)local F=g(n)local N=function(...)return e(Q,{...},n,F)end return N end,function(Q,n)local F=g(n)local N=function(N,o,w,q,a)return e(Q,{N,o;w;q;a},n,F)end return N end,function(Q,n)local F=g(n)local N=function(N,o,w)return e(Q,{N;o;w},n,F)end return N end,920644-920644 return(p(-719465+16897324,{}))(F(a))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[n(94365-125982)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
